services.title: Hair Extensions

services.title: Balayage & Colour

services.title: Precision Cutting

about: BY LIBBY HAIR | UK HAIRDRESSER & EXTENSIONIST specialises in precision hair extensions and cuts. Reviews highlight consistent quality and a no-nonsense approach

faq.q: Where is BY LIBBY HAIR | UK HAIRDRESSER & EXTENSIONIST based?
faq.a: BY LIBBY HAIR is a hairdresser and extensionist based in Derby. Contact via email: libbyhairstylist@gmail.com

faq.q: How do I book an appointment?
faq.a: Book by emailing libbyhairstylist@gmail.com. Include your preferred date, time, and service details

faq.q: What should I expect during my appointment?
faq.a: Expect a consultation to discuss your hair goals, followed by the agreed service. Bring reference photos if needed
